title: NIO Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: National Institute of Oceanography (NIO) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Oceanography has released the official notification for 1 Project Associate - I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Goa. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc Marine Science, MSc Oceanography, MSc Physical Oceanography, MSc Space Science and Technology
qualification.details: MSc Marine Science MSc Oceanography MSc Physical Oceanography MSc Space Science and Technology

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIO Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIO to complete the application.
